scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/session-core && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/web && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/server
scripts.dungeon:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/dungeon-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.gameplay:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/gameplay-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.guest:e2e: npm run build && npm run e2e --workspace @woven-deep/web
scripts.merchant:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/merchant-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.population:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/population-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.run-records:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/run-records-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.endgame:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/endgame-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.magic:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/magic-demo.mjs --verify
scripts.engine:demo: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && node scripts/engine-demo.mjs --verify packages/engine/fixtures/demo.commands
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/session-core && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/content && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/engine && npm run build --workspace @woven-deep/session-core && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run depcruise && npm run knip && npm run test
